prompt:
A thick floating tangle of hornwort and guppy grass packed at the aquarium surface, forming a protective canopy. The plants are dense enough to create shadowed pockets and tiny labyrinth-like gaps; small fry silhouettes and a few tiny microbubbles are hinted within the cover, clearly communicating “shelter at the surface.”

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image in a near-future solarpunk aquaria style: soft cinematic lighting, natural greens, clean glass reflections, no logos, and no readable text. Keep the composition uncluttered with the floating fry cover as the unmistakable focal subject.
